text:
Here's my data in a markdown table. Can you check it for errors?
| Product | Price | Stock |
|---------|-------|-------|
| Widget A | 9.99 | 150 |
| Widget B | 14.99 | 200 |
| Widget C | 24.99 | 75 |

Why is this YAML not parsing?
servers:
  - name: web01
    ip: 192.168.1.10
    role: frontend
  - name: db01
    ip: 192.168.1.20
    role: database
    port: 3306
  - name: cache01
    ip: 192.168.1.30
    role: redis
    port: 6379

Convert this CSV to a JSON array:
Name,Email,Department
John Doe,john@example.com,Engineering
Jane Smith,jane@test.org,Marketing
Bob Johnson,bob@co.net,Sales

Help me clean up this malformed CSV:
ID,Name,Age,City
1,Alice,30,New York
2,Bob,25,Los Angeles
3,Charlie,35,Chicago
4,Diana, "New York"
5,Eve,28,"San Francisco"

Can you fix this XML fragment? It's missing closing tags.
<books>
  <book id="1">
    <title>The Great Gatsby</title>
    <author>F. Scott Fitzgerald</author>
  </book>
  <book id="2">
    <title>1984</title>
    <author>George Orwell</author>
  </book>
</books>

Turn this bullet-point list into a table:
- Item: Laptop, Price: $999, Qty: 5
- Item: Monitor, Price: $299, Qty: 10
- Item: Keyboard, Price: $49, Qty: 20
- Item: Mouse, Price: $25, Qty: 30

Here's my config file. Why is it giving errors?
app:
  name: my-app
  version: 2.1.0
  database:
    host: localhost
    port: 5432
    username: admin
    password: secret123
  features:
    - login
    - signup
    - dashboard
  - logout

I pasted this data from Excel. Can you format it as a proper CSV?
Name: Smith, Age: 45, Dept: HR
Name: Jones, Age: 32, Dept: IT
Name: Lee, Age: 28, Dept: Marketing

Please convert this CSV to a markdown table:
Name,Age,City,Salary
John,34,New York,72000
Sarah,28,London,65000
Mike,45,Tokyo,89000
Emma,31,Paris,71000

My YAML config has an error somewhere - can you find it?
server:
  host: localhost
  port: 8080
database:
  name: mydb
  user: admin
  password: secret123
  pool: 10
logging:
  level: info
  file: app.log
  format: json
  retention: 30 days
features:
  - auth
  - caching
  - rate-limit

Here's an XML fragment from our API response:
<order id="12345" status="pending">
  <customer>
    <name>Jane Smith</name>
    <email>jane@email.com</email>
  </customer>
  <items>
    <item sku="LAP-001" qty="1">
      <name>Laptop Pro</name>
      <price>1299.99</price>
    </item>
  </items>
</order>

Create a hierarchical outline from these tasks:
Project Alpha, Research competitors, Analysis report, Design mockups, Homepage design, Dashboard design, Development, Backend API, Frontend implementation, Testing, Unit tests, Integration tests, Deployment, Server setup, DNS configuration

Can you convert this key-value data into a proper table?
app.version=2.3.1
app.environment=production
db.host=primary.db.com
db.port=5432
db.name=app_prod
cache.type=redis
cache.ttl=3600

Here's a spreadsheet-style data dump I need help cleaning. The columns are: Product ID, Name, Category, Price, Stock, Supplier
P1001, Wireless Mouse, Electronics, 29.99, 150, TechSupply
P1002, Coffee Maker, Appliances, 79.99, , HomeGoods
P1003, Yoga Mat, Sports, , 200, FitLife
P1004, Desk Lamp, Furniture, 45.50, 75, OfficePro

Could you reformat this markdown table to be more readable?
|ID|Name|Type|Power|Speed|
|-|-|-|-|-|
|1|Pikachu|Electric|55|90|
|2|Charizard|Fire|84|100|
|3|Blastoise|Water|83|78|
|4|Mewtwo|Psychic|110|130|

Generate a JSON structure for this recipe:
Recipe: Chocolate Chip Cookies
Ingredients: 2 cups flour, 1 cup butter, 1 cup sugar, 2 eggs, 1 tsp vanilla, 2 cups chocolate chips
Steps: Preheat oven to 375F, Mix dry ingredients, Cream butter and sugar, Add eggs and vanilla, Combine mixtures, Fold in chips, Bake 10-12 minutes
Yield: 24 cookies

Here's my budget in CSV - can you make it into a nice table?
Category,Budget,Spent,Remaining
Housing,1500,1450,50
Food,600,523,77
Transport,300,289,11
Utilities,200,195,5
Entertainment,150,180,-30
Savings,500,500,0
